page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn6i-c24g1.24xlarge is a GPU-accelerated server powered by an Intel Xeon 8163 processor with 96 dedicated physical cores and 96 vCPUs operating at 2.5 GHz. The system features 372.0 GB of system memory, providing 3.88 GB per core. For acceleration, it bundles four NVIDIA Turing T4 GPUs with a total of 64 GB of VRAM. It does not include local storage, relying instead on network-attached storage options, and provides a baseline network bandwidth of 30 Gbps.

Benchmark results highlight a clear contrast between single-core and multi-core performance. Single-core stress-ng and single-threaded compression tasks rank in the bottom 25% and bottom 10% respectively, reflecting the moderate 2.5 GHz clock speed of the Intel Xeon 8163. However, multi-core performance is strong, with stress-ng multi-core and multi-threaded bzip3 decompression scores placing in the top 25%. Memory bandwidth for cached small blocks is also strong, though uncached large-block read and write speeds remain average. Redis SET operations perform exceptionally well, ranking in the top 25%.

Given the lack of local storage and the moderate single-core CPU performance, this instance is optimized for workloads that can parallelize tasks across its 96 cores and four NVIDIA T4 GPUs. The resource density makes it a cost-efficient choice for multi-GPU workloads such as machine learning inference, video transcoding, and parallel data processing, rather than single-threaded applications. It is well-suited for distributed database operations, web serving, and GPU-accelerated parallel computing.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn6i-c24g1.24xlarge is a GPU-accelerated instance featuring 96 dedicated Intel Xeon 8163 vCPUs running at 2.5 GHz, 372.0 GB of system memory, and four NVIDIA Turing T4 GPUs providing 64 GB of total VRAM. The server does not include local storage but offers a 30 Gbps baseline network bandwidth. Performance benchmarks indicate weak single-core capabilities but strong multi-core and multi-threaded performance, alongside strong cached memory bandwidth and high Redis SET throughput. This hardware profile is optimized for parallelized workloads, making it highly suitable for machine learning inference, video transcoding, and distributed database tasks.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn6i-c24g1.24xlarge is a GPU-accelerated server with 96 Intel Xeon vCPUs, 372 GB RAM, and four NVIDIA T4 GPUs, optimized for parallel computing and machine learning inference.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn6i-c24g1.24xlarge features 96 Intel Xeon vCPUs, 372 GB RAM, and four NVIDIA T4 GPUs for parallelized workloads.
tagline: A dedicated multi-GPU server featuring ninety-six cores and four accelerators optimized for highly parallelized workloads and machine learning inference.
bullet_points: 96 dedicated Intel Xeon 8163 vCPUs and 372.0 GB of system memory
Four bundled NVIDIA Turing T4 GPUs with 64 GB total VRAM
Strong multi-core and multi-threaded benchmark performance
30 Gbps baseline network bandwidth with no local storage
Optimized for machine learning inference and parallel computing
